author: Jaan Altosaar
description: Turn a week of edits across all your notes into one LLM-ready review; like "track changes" for your whole vault, ready to paste into Claude or ChatGPT. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jaan Altosaar
manifest.description: Turn a week of edits across all your notes into one LLM-ready review — like "track changes" for your whole vault, ready to paste into Claude or ChatGPT.
manifest.name: Microlite

name: Microlite

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Microlite.

Turn Obsidian's File Recovery history into an LLM-ready review of what you've been writing: one dated note with a per-day activity table and heading-aware diffs (newest first), bulk-sync detection, rename tracking, live-content folding, and opened-but-unchanged notes dropped. Desktop and mobile; no network requests.
